hotels.name: Tanjong Suite Homestay
hotels.description_fr:
L’hébergement Tanjong Suite Homestay se situe à Kampong Tok Pakir. Vous bénéficierez d’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et d’un parking privé disponible sur place.

Cette maison de vacances avec climatisation se compose de 3 chambres séparées, d'un salon, d'une cuisine entièrement équipée, et de 3 salles de bains. Une télévision à écran plat est à disposition.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport Sultan Ismail Petra) est à 60 km.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
About this property

Comfortable Accommodation: Tanjong Suite Homestay in Kampong Tok Pakir offers a holiday home with three bedrooms and three bathrooms. The property features a spacious living room and a fully equipped kitchen.

Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, air-conditioning, and a TV. The kitchenette provides a convenient space for meal preparation.

Convenient Services: The homestay provides private check-in and check-out services, ensuring a smooth arrival and departure. Free on-site private parking is available for guests.

Accessible Location: Situated 60 km from Sultan Ismail Petra Airport, the property offers easy access to local attractions.

Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Tanjong Suite Homestay está en Kampong Tok Pakir. Hay wifi gratis y parking privado en el propio alojamiento.

Esta casa o chalet con aire acondicionado consta de 3 dormitorios independientes, una sala de estar, una cocina totalmente equipada y 3 baños. Hay TV de pantalla plana.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Sultán Ismail Petra) está a 60 km.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©

Tanjong Suite Homestay situa-se em Kampong Tok Pakir. Os hóspedes beneficiam de acesso Wi-Fi gratuito e estacionamento privado disponível no local.

Esta casa de férias com ar condicionado tem 3 quartos, uma sala de estar, uma cozinha totalmente equipada e 3 casas de banho. Uma televisão de ecrã plano está disponível.

O Aeroporto Sultão Ismail Petra fica a 60 km da propriedade.

hotels.description_it:
Tanjong Suite Homestay si trova a Kampong Tok Pakir. Potrete approfittare del WiFi gratis e di un parcheggio privato disponibile sul posto.

Questa casa vacanze con aria condizionata comprende 3 camere da letto, un soggiorno, una cucina con utensili e 3 bagni. Tra i servizi offerti troverete una TV a schermo piatto.

Aeroporto Sultan Ismail Petra si trova a 60 km dalla struttura.

hotels.name: Rembun Homestay, Besut
hotels.description_fr:
L’hébergement Rembun Homestay, Besut se trouve à Kampong Tok Pakir. Cet hébergement met à votre disposition un balcon, un parking privé gratuit et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite.

Cette maison de vacances avec climatisation se compose de 3 chambres, d'un salon, d'une cuisine entièrement équipée avec un réfrigérateur et une bouilloire, ainsi que de 3 salles de bains avec un bidet et une douche. Une télévision à écran plat est disponible.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport Sultan Ismail Petra) est à 59 km.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
About this property

Comfortable Accommodation: Rembun Homestay in Besut offers a holiday home with three bedrooms and three bathrooms. The property features a spacious living room, dining area, and a fully equipped kitchen.

Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, air-conditioning, and a balcony with a quiet street view. Additional amenities include a washing machine, refrigerator, microwave, TV, and a dining table.

Convenient Location: Located 59 km from Sultan Ismail Petra Airport, the homestay provides free on-site private parking. The surrounding area offers a peaceful environment.

Esta casa o chalet con aire acondicionado consta de 3 dormitorios, una sala de estar, una cocina totalmente equipada con nevera y hervidor, y 3 baños con bidet y ducha. Se ofrece TV de pantalla plana.

Questa casa vacanze con aria condizionata comprende 3 camere da letto, un soggiorno, una cucina con utensili, frigorifero e bollitore elettrico, e 3 bagni con bidet e doccia. A disposizione troverete una TV a schermo piatto.

hotels.name: Alunan Resort
hotels.description_fr:
Situé sur une plage tranquille, l’Alunan Resort offre une expérience moderne et tranquille.
Plongez dans la seule piscine à débordement de Perhentians surplombant une falaise.
Admirez le coucher de soleil légendaire lors de notre croisière au coucher du soleil dans le premier et unique yacht de sport de l’île.
Nous pratiquons les recommandations de plongée en apnée verte avec des guides formés à Emergency First Rescue (EFR).
Donnez un sens à vos vacances en participant au projet Alunan Coral et à nos 4 biologistes marins internes
Revêtues de parquet, les chambres climatisées disposent d’une terrasse privée bien exposée, d’un bureau, d’un portant à vêtements et d’une télévision par satellite à écran plat.
hotels.description_en:
Situated on a quiet beach, Alunan Resort offers a modern and tranquil experience.
Soak in Perhentians' only infinity pool overlooking a cliff.
View the legendary sunset on our Sunset Cruise in the island's first and only Sport Yacht.
We practice green snorkeling recommendations with Emergency First Rescue (EFR) trained guides.
Make your holiday meaningful by participating in the Alunan Coral Project and our 4 in-house Marine Biologists
Offering sea views from the private sundeck, air-conditioned rooms are furnished with parquet flooring, a desk, clothes rack and a flat-screen TV with satellite channels. The en suite bathroom includes shower facility, towels and free toiletries.
This non-smoking property houses a 2 restaurants serving an appetising selection of local and Western cuisine.
hotels.description_es:
Situated on a quiet beach, Alunan Resort offers a modern and tranquil experience.
Soak in Perhentians' only infinity pool overlooking a cliff.
View the legendary sunset on our Sunset Cruise in the island's first and only Sport Yacht.
We practice green snorkeling recommendations with Emergency First Rescue (EFR) trained guides.
Make your holiday meaningful by participating in the Alunan Coral Project and our 4 in-house Marine Biologists
Offering sea views from the private sundeck, air-conditioned rooms are furnished with parquet flooring, a desk, clothes rack and a flat-screen TV with satellite channels. The en suite bathroom includes shower facility, towels and free toiletries.
This non-smoking property houses a 2 restaurants serving an appetising selection of local and Western cuisine.
hotels.description_it:
Situato su una spiaggia appartata, l'Alunan Resort offre un'esperienza moderna e tranquilla.
Durante il soggiorno potrete immergervi nell'unica piscina a sfioro di Perhentian, affacciata su una scogliera.
La struttura propone la Sunset Cruise, la crociera a bordo del primo e unico Sport Yacht dell'isola, che vi permetterà di ammirare il leggendario tramonto.
Il resort osserva le indicazioni dello snorkeling ecologico, organizzato con guide qualificate Emergency First Rescue (EFR).
Potrete rendere la vostra vacanza più significativa partecipando all'Alunan Coral Project insieme ai 4 biologi marini della struttura.
Dotate di terrazza solarium privata con vista sul mare, le camere dispongono di aria condizionata, parquet, scrivania, appendiabiti e TV satellitare a schermo piatto.
